description: A unit clerk needs to process the discharge for a patient who has been cleared to go home.

nodes.task_description: Receive the discharge order from the physician.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies the discharge order is signed and present in the patient's chart.

nodes.task_description: Process the discharge ADT message in the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the patient's status to 'Discharged'.

nodes.task_description: Update the bed management system to show the patient's bed is now 'dirty' and requires cleaning.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent updates the bed status, triggering a notification to environmental services.
